scripts.gen: rm -rf src/generated && openapi-generator-cli generate -i ../json/business.json -g typescript-fetch -o src/generated --skip-validate-spec --global-property apis=Expenses:Transactions:Accounts:AccountingCategories:TaxRates,models,supportingFiles --additional-properties=supportsES6=true,typescriptThreePlus=true,withoutRuntimeChecks=true && node scripts/patch-generated.mjs
